name: PR detail Smart Diff groups files core-above-boilerplate with findings badges
description: From PR #483 (the seeded mega-PR: 8 files / 520 changed lines, mixing core/wiring/boilerplate), open the Files changed tab. Smart order is the default view: confirms the Core logic group and a core file render, the Boilerplate group starts collapsed (its file is not on the page until its header is clicked), and the seeded review's findings surface as a 'N findings' badge + the split_suggestion banner (8 files / 520 lines clears both too_big thresholds). Read-only seeded data (no model call — Smart Diff is a deterministic recomposition of already-persisted files + findings, zero new LLM calls). Assumes a freshly-seeded DB (see e2e/README.md).

steps.label: navigate to the PR detail route
switch to the Files changed tab
diff tab is active in the URL
Smart order is the default view
the seeded review's findings surface as a badge on the core file
split_suggestion banner shows for the oversized mega-PR
the boilerplate group header renders (collapsed — its file is not yet visible)
the lock file appears only after expanding boilerplate
